description: The company has a tiered shipping rate structure (e.g., free shipping over $50). The system must apply the correct rate at checkout.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the subtotal of the items in the customer's cart.

expected_outcome.expected: System correctly calculates the cart subtotal.

nodes.task_description: Compare the subtotal to the defined shipping tiers (e.g., Tier 1: $0-$49.99 = $5 shipping; Tier 2: $50+ = free shipping).

expected_outcome.expected: System correctly identifies which tier the cart falls into.

nodes.task_description: Apply the correct shipping cost to the order total.

expected_outcome.expected: System adds the appropriate shipping charge to the final price.
